opportunities.specific_product: Mamma Mia Waterproof Stretch Sofa Cover
opportunities.transformation_hook: I saved my $1,200 couch from my dog for $47 — no sewing needed
opportunities.before_state: Shredded, stained, pet-hair-covered sofa that embarrasses guests and smells like wet dog
opportunities.after_state: Sleek, clean, wrinkle-free couch that looks brand new — guests ask if you replaced it
buyer_intent_keywords: couch cover that stays in place
opportunities.why_now: Spring shedding season peaks in May, driving a surge in pet-hair-destroyed-furniture searches and impulse buys before summer hosting begins.

opportunities.specific_product: Eli & Elm Original Side Sleeper Pillow
opportunities.transformation_hook: I woke up without neck pain for the first time in 2 years — $59 pillow did it
opportunities.before_state: Flat, lumpy standard pillow causing shoulder and neck pain, waking up stiff, chiropractic bills piling up
opportunities.after_state: Curved cutout cradles shoulder, spine aligned, sleeping through the night, neck pain gone by day 3
buyer_intent_keywords: pillow for neck pain side sleeper
how to stop waking up with neck pain
opportunities.why_now: Sleep wellness content is sustaining high CPM in 2026 and the 20% Eli & Elm commission makes this a high-value play even at moderate view counts.
